hero.description: From telecom infrastructure to workflow intelligence — tailor-made solutions for your growth.

about.title: Who we are?
about.paragraph: For over 15 years, Oriotel has been supporting companies in their digital transformation and the optimization of their critical infrastructures. Our expertise ranges from managing telecom networks to implementing custom software solutions to orchestrate your operations with precision and agility.

testimonials_section.title: Testimonials
testimonials_section.description: Discover the feedback from our partners and clients who have transformed their vision into success.

items.quote: Oriotel's operational strategy allowed us to scale our processes with disconcerting fluidity.

items.quote: Oriotel's teams master the art of optimizing at all levels while respecting the company's identity.

footer.description: ORIOTEL is a Moroccan company specialized in the purchase and sale of telephone and electrical devices. Thanks to its expertise in trading and intermediation, it supports large telecommunications companies as well as individuals by offering them reliable, modern and accessible products and services.

hero.title: A Vision of Excellence
hero.subtitle: About Us
hero.description: ORIOTEL was born from the ambition to redefine the standards of enterprise architecture and operational excellence. We support the most demanding organizations in their strategic transformation.

company.description: ORIOTEL is a pioneer in critical infrastructure management.
company.longDescription: For over 15 years, we have been supporting companies in their digital transformation with unmatched precision and agility.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: Propel your structure toward excellence with our tailored architectural and operational solutions. We transform your challenges into competitive advantages.

items.title: Enterprise Architecture
items.desc: Design and modeling of robust and agile organizational structures in the face of market evolutions.
items.details: We analyze your organization from A to Z to design a structural model that combines clarity, efficiency, and scalability. Our approach integrates international best practices while respecting your corporate culture.
points: Diagnostic of the existing organizational structure
Business process modeling (BPMN, ArchiMate)
Strategic alignment between IT and business
Definition of roles, responsibilities, and governance
Architectural transformation roadmap

items.title: Operational Optimization
items.desc: Continuous improvement of your internal processes for maximum output and controlled costs.
items.details: Our experts identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and sources of waste in your operations to deploy measurable and sustainable improvement levers.
points: Mapping and audit of operational processes
Deployment of Lean & Six Sigma methodologies
Reduction of production costs and lead times
Implementation of key performance indicators (KPIs)
Change management and team training

items.title: Strategic Consulting
items.desc: Supporting your leaders toward high-impact decision-making for the company's future.
items.details: Our senior consultants work directly with your executive committee to co-build differentiating strategies, anchored in market reality and results-oriented.
points: Market analysis and competitive intelligence
Definition of vision and strategic orientations
Business plan and business model development
Growth, M&A, and expansion strategy
Executive coaching and management committee facilitation

items.title: Bespoke Support
items.desc: A continuous presence and personalized follow-up at every key stage of your structure's growth.
items.details: Every company is unique. That's why our support programs are fully personalized according to your sector, maturity, and specific objectives.
points: Monthly follow-up program with performance reviews
Dedicated referent available throughout the project
Co-construction workshops and strategic workshops
Continuous adaptation of the action plan based on results
Transparent reporting and personalized dashboards

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.desc: Integrate new technologies at the heart of your business to gain agility and performance.
items.details: Digital transformation is not just about technology: it's a profound cultural change. We guide you from digital strategy to implementation, bringing your employees on board.
points: Digital maturity audit and digital diagnosis
Definition of the transformation roadmap
Selection and integration of digital tools (ERP, CRM, BI…)
Change management and skills development
Optimization of client and employee experience

items.title: Transition Management
items.desc: Intervention of high-level experts to pilot your teams during critical phases or transformation.
items.details: When your company is going through a crisis, a restructuring, or a period of rapid growth, our transition managers intervene quickly to stabilize, pilot, and transform.
points: Quick takeover (48h to 72h) in operational mode
Crisis management and recovery plan
Piloting of restructuring and reorganization projects
Interim general management, GM, CFO, HRD, CIO
Skills transfer and handover with internal teams

jobs.title: Network and Telecom Engineer
responsibilities: Deploy, configure, and maintain network infrastructures.
Ensure system security and risk prevention.

jobs.title: Electrical Project Manager
responsibilities: Manage and lead technical teams in the field.
Ensure compliance with current safety standards.
